common.slogan: No lies. No shortcuts. Think for yourself.
about.brandTagline: Learn to think. Live with clarity.
about.title: Learn to think. Live with clarity.
about.introduction: Lifeschool is a private learning space where AI helps you examine choices, assumptions, and emotions without replacing your judgment.
about.missionBody: Strengthen self-understanding and lifelong learning through honest examination.
about.whyExistsBody: Lifeschool exists to help learners examine assumptions clearly and make responsible decisions with dignity, freedom, and accountability.
about.whoStewardBody: Steward is an educational assistant designed to support reflection, not replace human judgment.
about.notBody: Lifeschool is not therapy, emergency support, propaganda, or a final authority over your decisions.
about.curriculumWorksBody: Each module contains six practical lessons that move from concept to exercise and reflection, then optional guided practice with Steward.
about.roadmapBody: Future releases expand multilingual depth, curriculum breadth, and verification tooling while preserving learner safety and constitutional traceability.
about.openDevelopmentBody: Development remains transparent, test-driven, and reviewable. We prefer simple, auditable changes over hidden complexity.
about.footerCtaBody: Explore the curriculum directly or continue your reflection with Steward.
about.philosophyBody: Steward does not command or decide for learners. It supports human freedom and responsibility.
about.howBody: Ask a question, examine your assumptions, test evidence, and choose your next step.
privacy.title: Your conversation is your space
privacy.intro: This page explains what Lifeschool stores locally, what it sends to external processors, and what it does not retain.
privacy.sessionStorageBody: Learner conversation text is kept in browser memory for the current tab session so you can continue the active exchange.
privacy.languagePreferenceBody: Lifeschool stores only your language choice locally to keep interface labels in your preferred locale.
privacy.noHistoryBody: Lifeschool does not create learner accounts and does not persist learner chat history in the client application.
privacy.openAiBody: Learner prompts are processed by an external model provider for response generation via
privacy.contactProcessingBody: Contact requests are processed to respond to your inquiry and maintain service reliability, including abuse and rate-limit controls.
privacy.cookiesBody: Lifeschool does not use analytics cookies or advertising cookies. The cookie banner records only your Accept or Decline choice.
terms.title: Use with care and responsibility
terms.intro: These terms explain responsibility boundaries for learners and platform operators in this production service.
terms.limitationBody: Steward is an educational assistant. It is not a therapist, emergency service, or final authority.
terms.responsibilityBody: You remain responsible for your decisions, actions, and interpretation of outputs.
terms.storageBody: Lifeschool stores only local interface preferences and does not provide persistent learner history in the client interface.
terms.openAiBody: Message content may be sent to an external model provider to generate assistant responses via
terms.contactProcessingBody: Contact requests are processed to respond to inquiries and enforce anti-abuse protections.
terms.cookiesBody: Lifeschool does not use advertising or analytics cookies. Only cookie banner preference choice is remembered.
terms.availabilityBody: This private alpha is experimental and may change, pause, or become unavailable without notice.
contact.title: Help us improve this alpha
contact.intro: For feedback, bug reports, and collaboration requests, contact the Lifeschool team at:
contact.reportHint: Include your browser, route, and a short reproduction note when reporting issues.
support.pageSubtitle: Help make high-quality thinking education accessible to everyone.
support.heroHeadline: Building a generation of clearer thinkers.
support.heroBodyOne: Lifeschool exists to help people think more clearly, communicate better, make wiser decisions, strengthen relationships, and live with greater intention.
support.heroBodyTwo: We are seeking organizations that believe education should help people develop better judgment-not tell them what to think.
support.linksBody: Explore the pages that show where Lifeschool is heading and how your support can help.
support.linkSupporterBody: Partner with Lifeschool while protecting educational independence.
support.linkTransparencyBody: Review how we publish accountability, governance, and progress.
support.linkResearchBody: See the evidence and principles that shape Lifeschool.
support.linkImpactBody: Track the current platform footprint and educational direction.
support.linkRoadmapBody: Follow what has shipped and what is planned next.
support.linkPressBody: Access logos, institutional summary, and media resources.
support.linkEducatorsBody: Find school and classroom pathways for Lifeschool adoption.
support.independenceBody: Financial supporters help sustain Lifeschool. They do not influence educational content or institutional direction.
support.recognitionBody: Supporters are recognized transparently according to contribution tier.
support.statusTitle: We are looking for our first Founding Supporter.
support.statusBody: This space is reserved for organizations that believe in Lifeschool's mission and respect its educational independence.
support.transparencyBody: Lifeschool intends to publish supporter lists, annual transparency reports, educational roadmap updates, and major milestones.
support.faqQ5: How do we become a supporter?
roadmap.heroSubtitle: Building the future of thinking education, one step at a time.
roadmap.noteBody: This roadmap may evolve based on learner feedback, educational priorities, and implementation learnings.
updates.heroSubtitle: Transparent release history with newest updates first.
updates.release1Summary: Production information pages and trust layer improvements.
updates.release1Improvements: Added /support and /roadmap informational pages with stronger production discoverability.
updates.release1Fixes: Resolved cross-page navigation inconsistencies and service worker 503 noise during regular browsing.
updates.release1Performance: Reduced unnecessary fetch handling paths in service worker edge cases.
updates.release1Accessibility: Improved landmark coverage, navigation clarity, and semantic sectioning on informational pages.
updates.release1Languages: Expanded EN and EL localized coverage for informational content.
updates.release1Future: Prepare transparent release timeline and broader curriculum expansion modules.
updates.release2Summary: Production hardening for discovery and trust signals.
updates.release2Improvements: Published canonical sitemap and robots directives for public educational pages.
updates.release2Fixes: Fixed static HEAD handling behavior for core public assets.
updates.release2Performance: Improved static-asset serving reliability for repeated requests.
updates.release2Accessibility: Stabilized page-level semantic structure and keyboard-safe controls.
updates.release2Languages: Maintained multilingual parity checks in release workflow.
updates.release2Future: Expand release transparency and course publication cadence.
updates.release3Summary: Core learning surface and quality baseline release.
updates.release3Improvements: Delivered six foundation modules and Steward learning workflow.
updates.release3Fixes: Closed early alpha defects across lesson rendering and navigation behavior.
updates.release3Performance: Improved first-load stability for core learning routes.
updates.release3Accessibility: Introduced baseline responsive and accessible UI primitives.
updates.release3Languages: Released bilingual interface support for English and Greek.
updates.release3Future: Strengthen platform reliability and institutional transparency tooling.
faq.heroSubtitle: Clear answers to the most common questions about Lifeschool.
faq.a1: Lifeschool is an educational platform for clearer thinking, better decisions, and stronger self-understanding.
faq.a2: Steward is Lifeschool's educational guide that helps learners examine ideas and assumptions without replacing human judgment.
faq.a3: Yes. Steward uses AI to support reflection and learning conversations under educational boundaries.
faq.a4: No. Lifeschool is educational, not therapy or medical care.
faq.a5: No. Lifeschool provides educational guidance, not personal coaching services.
faq.a6: Lifeschool stores only limited local preferences and does not provide persistent learner account history.
faq.a7: Yes. Schools can use Lifeschool as a thinking and reflection learning companion.
faq.a8: Yes. Universities and educational institutions can discuss partnerships through the contact channel.
faq.a9: Core learning access is currently available without paid accounts during this stage.
faq.a10: The current design prioritizes simplicity, privacy, and learner-first access without account friction.
faq.a11: Yes. More modules are planned and expanded over time through roadmap milestones.
faq.a12: Yes. You can contribute feedback, issues, and ideas through official contact channels.
faq.a13: Yes. Visit the support page for collaboration and support pathways.
faq.a14: Yes. Organizations can partner with Lifeschool while respecting educational independence.
impact.heroSubtitle: Current platform footprint and active development direction.
impact.realDataNote: Only currently verified platform values are shown.
impact.phaseValue: Production hardening and transparent institutional surfaces.
impact.nextMilestoneValue: Expand curriculum breadth while preserving learner-safe architecture.
impact.currentGoalValue: Improve trust, clarity, and quality of the production learning experience.
impact.longTermVisionValue: A global thinking education platform that strengthens freedom, responsibility, and human dignity.
press.heroSubtitle: Resources for journalists, editors, and media teams.
press.missionBody: Strengthen self-understanding and lifelong learning through honest examination.
press.shortDescriptionBody: Lifeschool is a learning platform that helps people think clearly, understand themselves, and make wiser decisions.
press.longDescriptionBody: Lifeschool combines structured lessons and an educational AI guide called Steward to help learners examine assumptions, communicate clearly, and act responsibly without replacing human judgment.
press.founderBody: Lifeschool is developed by AlphaSynth AI with an educational mission centered on dignity, freedom, and responsibility.
press.brandGuidelinesBody: Use Lifeschool name, logo, and colors without altering proportions or introducing misleading context.
educators.heroSubtitle: Classroom-ready guidance for reflective learning and critical thinking.
educators.teachingBody: Use Lifeschool to structure thoughtful dialogue, guided reflection, and practical reasoning exercises.
educators.universitiesBody: Support seminars on reasoning, argument quality, and ethical analysis.
educators.schoolsBody: Introduce age-appropriate reflection, evidence checks, and respectful discussion norms.
educators.adultEducationBody: Use structured prompts to connect learning goals with personal and professional decisions.
educators.discussionGroupsBody: Guide conversations with clear questions, perspective-taking, and accountable conclusions.
educators.criticalThinkingBody: Lifeschool activities help learners identify assumptions, evaluate evidence, and test alternative interpretations.
educators.stewardClassroomsBody: Steward supports question-led inquiry and reflection while preserving educator authority and student responsibility.
educators.faqQuestion1: Can it fit short class periods?
educators.faqAnswer1: Yes. Activities can run in short cycles with prompts, reflection, and brief synthesis.
educators.faqAnswer2: Yes. Educators can evaluate reasoning quality, clarity, and evidence use with transparent rubrics.
educators.faqAnswer3: No. It supports instruction; educators remain responsible for goals, context, and judgment.
educators.futureFeaturesBody: Planned work includes classroom templates, facilitator guides, and stronger educator tooling for lesson preparation.
educators.ctaBody: Explore the curriculum and run a small classroom pilot focused on reflective discussion.
educators.contactBody: For educator collaboration or classroom pilots, contact us.
research.heroSubtitle: A professional overview of Lifeschool's educational foundations and research direction.
research.whyExistsBody: Lifeschool exists to strengthen independent thinking, responsible judgment, and lifelong learning through structured examination.
research.principle1Body: Learners first clarify assumptions, definitions, and evidence before reaching conclusions.
research.principle2Body: Learning design supports autonomy while keeping ownership of decisions with the learner.
research.principle3Body: Progress comes through examined dialogue, not unchallenged authority.
research.thinkingOverAnswersBody: Lifeschool prioritizes reasoning quality, self-examination, and evidence use over fast, unexamined answers.
research.stewardWorksBody: Steward asks clarifying questions, surfaces assumptions, and offers structured reflection paths while avoiding command authority.
research.curriculumDesignBody: Curriculum modules follow a six-lesson structure that moves from concept to practice and reflective integration.
research.aiRoleBody: AI is used as an educational instrument that supports inquiry and reflection, not as a substitute for human agency.
research.directionBody: Current research focuses on measurable learning clarity, transfer of reasoning skills, and safe human-AI educational interaction.
research.independenceBody: Institutional, financial, or technical supporters do not control curriculum principles, learning outcomes, or constitutional direction.
research.transparencyBody: Lifeschool publishes methods, assumptions, limitations, and release changes to support external review and trust.
research.futureBody: Future work includes deeper multilingual studies, classroom transfer outcomes, and longitudinal reflection quality indicators.
research.contactBody: For research collaboration, institutional dialogue, or academic inquiries, contact us.
transparency.heroSubtitle: A professional governance overview of how Lifeschool is organized, funded, and reviewed.
transparency.missionBody: Lifeschool serves self-understanding, lifelong learning, dignity, freedom, and responsibility through educational practice.
transparency.governanceBody: Governance follows constitutional hierarchy and document traceability so major decisions remain reviewable and justified.
transparency.fundingBody: Funding supports educational infrastructure and development, without authority over curriculum principles or learner-facing direction.
transparency.supportersBody: Supporters are acknowledged transparently according to public criteria and cannot purchase influence over educational standards.
transparency.privacyBody: Privacy design minimizes stored learner data and clearly states what is processed, retained, and excluded from tracking.
transparency.aiUsageBody: AI is used as an educational support tool with strict role boundaries, preserving human judgment and responsibility.
transparency.independenceBody: Institutional partnerships, funding, and tooling do not determine educational truth claims, learner decisions, or constitutional commitments.
transparency.openDevelopmentBody: Development is test-driven, documented, and reviewable, favoring explicit reasoning over hidden complexity.
transparency.reportsBody: Lifeschool publishes report-style updates on roadmap progress, boundaries, and key production changes.
transparency.futureReportsBody: Future annual reporting will summarize educational progress, governance changes, and platform accountability indicators.
transparency.contactBody: For governance, funding, or institutional transparency inquiries, contact us.
careers.heroSubtitle: Lifeschool future opportunities and mission-aligned interest.
careers.currentLine2: If you believe in Lifeschool's mission,
careers.currentLine3: we would still love to hear from you.
developers.heroSubtitle: Documentation roadmap for future technical integrations.
developers.documentationOnlyBody: No implementation is available yet. This page documents planned integration directions only.
developers.contactBody: If your organization is interested in future integrations, contact us to share context and needs.
home.heroHeadline: Learn to think clearly. Understand yourself. Live intentionally.
home.heroSubheading: Lifeschool helps you develop better thinking, deeper self-understanding, clearer communication, wiser decisions, healthier relationships, and a more intentional life.
home.heroSupport: Steward is a guide, not an authority. You stay responsible for your judgment.
home.howStep2: Learn one lesson at a time.
home.moduleSpotlightBody: Learn how to separate observation from interpretation, examine assumptions, and make better decisions.
share.homeText: Lifeschool helps people think clearly, understand themselves, and live intentionally.
share.copyUnavailable: Copy is unavailable on this device.
share.moduleText: I am exploring the {module} module on Lifeschool.
share.lessonText: I am studying {module}, lesson {number}: {lesson} on Lifeschool.
home.whyBodyOne: Lifeschool doesn't teach you what to think.
home.whyBodyTwo: It helps you examine assumptions, understand emotions, communicate clearly, make thoughtful decisions, strengthen relationships, and live with greater intention.
home.whyBodyThree: Steward is a guide, not an authority.
home.whyBodyFour: The goal is not to replace your judgment. The goal is to help you develop it.
home.introduction: Lifeschool is a learning platform where Steward helps you practice clearer thinking without replacing your judgment.
home.principleThinkClearlyBody: See what is real, not just what feels true.
home.principleUnderstandYourselfBody: Respect your feelings while staying curious.
home.principleLiveIntentionallyBody: Make choices that align with what matters.
home.valueGuidedLearningBody: Structured lessons that build understanding, not memorization.
home.valuePrivateSafeBody: Your conversations stay private. You control your journey.
home.valueHumanCenteredBody: Steward is here to help you think, not to replace your thinking.
home.valueIntegrityBody: Designed with a clear philosophy: teach how to think, not what to think.
learn.identity: Steward helps you examine questions honestly without replacing your judgment.
learn.limitation: Steward is not a therapist, emergency service, or final authority.
learn.emptyPrompt: What would you like to examine?
learn.emptyPrivacy: Your conversation stays only in this browser tab.
learn.messagePlaceholder: Write a question or describe what you are considering...
learn.memoryNotice: Conversation is held in browser memory only.
learn.clientUnavailable: I am not able to respond reliably right now. You may try again or stop here.
learn.quickPromptNextLesson: Give me one practical next lesson I should do now, and one question to test my thinking.
courses.introduction: Practice one clearer way of thinking, speaking, deciding, or reflecting.
courses.moduleDescription: Learn to slow down thought, examine claims, and separate facts, feelings, assumptions, interpretations, and conclusions.
courses.noAccount: No account or saved progress is required.
courses.learningNote: Learning remains an invitation. Your judgment and responsibility remain your own.
courses.lesson1Title: What happened vs. what it means
courses.lesson2Title: Feelings are real, but not always final evidence
courses.module2Description: Practice clearer listening, requests, boundaries, and repair in difficult conversations.
courses.module3Description: Learn to define decisions, examine tradeoffs, and move from indecision to action.
courses.module4Description: Understand emotional patterns without surrendering judgment or responsibility.
courses.module5Description: Strengthen trust, boundaries, repair, and collaboration in human relationships.
courses.module6Description: Build direction through values, contribution, and responsible long-horizon commitments.
lesson.exerciseIncomplete: Complete both fields to continue with your own example.
lesson.exerciseReady: Your exercise is ready to examine with Steward.
lesson.fieldNote: Your writing stays only on this page and is not saved.
lesson.practiceMemory: Practice conversation remains in browser memory only.
lesson.clientUnavailable: I am not able to respond reliably right now. You may try again or stop here.
lesson.completionRecords: Completion records practice for this page session only.
lesson.notComplete: Not marked complete in this session.
lesson.completeStatus: Lesson {number} is complete for this page session.
certificate.title: Module Completion Certificate
certificate.intro: Generate a professional certificate PDF for this module completion.
certificate.helpfulSaved: Thank you. Helpful module feedback recorded anonymously.
certificate.shareFallback: Share unavailable. Certificate details were copied when possible.
certificate.unavailable: Certificate action is unavailable right now.
lesson.quickPromptNextLesson: Give me the next lesson-sized practice step based on my latest reflection.
